title: Spring Boot in Action
author: Craig Walls
description: Comprehensive guide to building Spring Boot applications with real-world examples.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship and coding best practices.

title: Effective Java
author: Joshua Bloch
description: Best practices and advanced techniques for programming in Java.

title: Head First Design Patterns
author: Eric Freeman
description: Easy-to-understand introduction to software design patterns.

title: MongoDB: The Definitive Guide

description: Detailed guide to MongoDB database development and administration.

title: Java Concurrency in Practice
author: Brian Goetz
description: Essential concepts and practical approaches for concurrent programming in Java.

title: Thymeleaf Essentials

description: Learn server-side Java templating with Thymeleaf and Spring Boot.

title: Microservices with Spring Boot

description: Build scalable and distributed microservices using Spring Boot and Spring Cloud.

title: Data Structures and Algorithms in Java

description: Detailed explanation of data structures and algorithms using Java.
